description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case, metal stud detail around the dial Dial style: Steel colour dial, markings and hands, branding near the 6 hour mark, date display near the 3 hour mark Strap style: Steel colour metal bracelet style strap with a double press release fold over closure Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
